ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image, including any relevant notes or comments */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of manual annotation */,
  "annotations_count" INTEGER /* Number of annotations made on the image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the image */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the image */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment the patient is undergoing */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "patient_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "patient_weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "patient_height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who entered the patient information */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the patient information */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image the cell belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cell */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the cell */,
  "parent" TEXT /* Parent structure of the cell */,
  "roi" TEXT /* Region of interest (ROI) for the cell */,
  "centroid_x_px" REAL /* X-coordinate of the cell's centroid */,
  "centroid_y_px" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the cell's centroid */,
  "detection_probability" REAL /* Probability of cell detection */,
  "area_px2" REAL /* Area of the cell in pixels squared */,
  "length_px" REAL /* Length of the cell in pixels */,
  "circularity" REAL /* Circularity of the cell */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the cell */,
  "max_diameter_px" REAL /* Maximum diameter of the cell in pixels */,
  "min_diameter_px" REAL /* Minimum diameter of the cell in pixels */,
  "cell_status" TEXT /* Status of the cell */,
  "cell_annotation" TEXT /* Manual annotation notes for the cell */,
  "cell_image_path" TEXT /* Path to a cropped image of the cell */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who detected the cell */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the cell information */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell feature set */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "hematoxylin_mean" REAL /* Mean intensity of hematoxylin stain */,
  "hematoxylin_median" REAL /* Median intensity of hematoxylin stain */,
  "hematoxylin_min" REAL /* Minimum intensity of hematoxylin stain */,
  "hematoxylin_max" REAL /* Maximum intensity of hematoxylin stain */,
  "hematoxylin_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of hematoxylin stain intensity */,
  "eosin_mean" REAL /* Mean intensity of eosin stain */,
  "eosin_median" REAL /* Median intensity of eosin stain */,
  "eosin_min" REAL /* Minimum intensity of eosin stain */,
  "eosin_max" REAL /* Maximum intensity of eosin stain */,
  "eosin_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of eosin stain intensity */,
  "delaunay_num_neighbors" INTEGER /* Number of neighbors in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "delaunay_mean_distance" REAL /* Mean distance in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "delaunay_median_distance" REAL /* Median distance in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "delaunay_max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "delaunay_min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "delaunay_mean_triangle_area" REAL /* Mean triangle area in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "delaunay_max_triangle_area" REAL /* Maximum triangle area in Delaunay triangulation */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the cell features */,
  "feature_annotation" TEXT /* Manual annotation notes for the cell features */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who computed the features */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the feature information */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_features_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the cluster */,
  "max_prediction_probability" REAL /* Maximum prediction probability of cells in the cluster */,
  "cluster_status" TEXT /* Status of the cluster */,
  "cluster_annotation" TEXT /* Manual annotation notes for the cluster */,
  "cluster_image_path" TEXT /* Path to a representative image of the cluster */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who formed the cluster */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the cluster information */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pathologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the image */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
